mapper.select: select u.user_id as userId, u.available_points as userAvailablePoints, u.frozen_points as userFrozenPoints, a.account_id as accountId, a.available_points as accountAvailablePoints, a.frozen_points as accountFrozenPoints, a.version as version, a.owner_type as ownerType, a.total_earn as totalEarn, a.total_spend as totalSpend, a.growth_value as growthValue, a.current_level_id as currentLevelId from jst_user u left join jst_points_account a on a.account_id = ( select aa.account_id from jst_points_account aa where aa.owner_id = u.user_id and aa.owner_type in ('user', 'student') and aa.del_flag = '0' order by case when aa.owner_type = 'user' then 0 else 1 end limit 1 ) where u.user_id = #{userId} and u.del_flag = '0' limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into jst_points_account ( owner_type, owner_id, available_points, frozen_points, total_earn, total_spend, growth_value, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( 'user', #{userId}, #{availablePoints}, #{frozenPoints}, 0, 0, 0, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, '0' )
